title: PhD Program in Speech and Language Disorders Therapy Mission and Vision
content:
PhD Program in Speech and Language Disorders Therapy Mission and Vision

MISSION

Üsküdar University Language and Speech Therapy Postgraduate Programs provide the students with the courses conducted by competent faculty members and the candidates to participate in the profession as personnel who have acquired advanced skills in the field, to produce basic and clinical research in the field, to train qualified researcher professionals in the field of language and speech disorders and therapy. .

VISION

To be a leading and sought-after program to train speech and language therapists trained for clinical, research and leadership roles who are ready to work successfully with culturally and/or linguistically diverse individuals in Turkey, to deliver basic and clinical research results in national and international To reach the goal of a center of excellence with training and research based on expertise in the field of speech and language therapy by publishing it on different platforms.
